mapper.sql: id, order_id, order_sn, payment_channel, payment_method, payment_amount, currency, payment_status, third_party_order_id, third_party_trade_no, payment_url, qr_code_url, request_params, payment_response, notify_response, failure_reason, payment_time, notify_time, expire_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oms_payment_record ( order_id, order_sn, payment_channel, payment_method, payment_amount, currency, payment_status, third_party_order_id, third_party_trade_no, payment_url, qr_code_url, request_params, payment_response, notify_response, failure_reason, payment_time, notify_time, expire_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderSn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentChannel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thirdPartyOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thirdPartyTradeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qrCodeUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestParams,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{paymentResponse,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{notifyResponse,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{failureReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{notifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{expireTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE oms_payment_record SET order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, order_sn = #{orderSn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payment_channel = #{paymentChannel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payment_amount = #{paymentAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, currency = #{currency,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payment_status = #{paymentStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, third_party_order_id = #{thirdPartyOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, third_party_trade_no = #{thirdPartyTradeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payment_url = #{paymentUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qr_code_url = #{qrCodeUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, request_params = #{requestParams,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, payment_response = #{paymentResponse,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, notify_response = #{notifyResponse,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, failure_reason = #{failureReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payment_time = #{paymentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, notify_time = #{notifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, expire_time = #{expireTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM oms_payment_record WHERE order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM oms_payment_record WHERE third_party_order_id = #{thirdPartyOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM oms_payment_record WHERE payment_status = #{paymentStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE oms_payment_record SET payment_status = #{paymentStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payment_time = #{paymentTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE oms_payment_record SET third_party_order_id = #{thirdPartyOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, third_party_trade_no = #{thirdPartyTradeNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payment_response = #{paymentResponse,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
